questions.q: According to an April 15, 2026 report, a complete visual record of which synth-pop duo went straight to the top of the UK's Independent Bookshop Top 20 chart?
According to a Senate Democrats report released in mid-April 2026, what did drugmakers do despite deals touted by Donald Trump?
options: Raised prices on hundreds of drugs
questions.correctText: Raised prices on hundreds of drugs

questions.q: According to new footage shown at CinemaCon 2026, Jason Statham's character Adam Clay returns in 'The Beekeeper 2' to rescue which kidnapped figure?
options: The President of the United States
questions.correctText: The President of the United States

questions.q: What video game developer recently issued a takedown of a YouTube channel showcasing "adult-oriented" mods for characters in their hit horror franchise?
A mid-April 2026 study found that drinking two to three cups of coffee a day is linked to a lower risk of what condition?
During the Jackie Robinson Day festivities on April 15, 2026, a pre-game singer collapsed before a matchup between which two MLB teams?
options: Tampa Bay Rays and Chicago White Sox
Los Angeles Dodgers and San Diego Padres
New York Yankees and Boston Red Sox
Atlanta Braves and New York Mets
questions.correctText: Tampa Bay Rays and Chicago White Sox

questions.q: Researchers in San Francisco reported 'unprecedented' results in an April 2026 clinical trial, getting closer to a potential cure for what disease?
According to an announcement on April 15, 2026, which major publishing house is cutting 55 roles across its UK and US operations as part of a significant restructuring?
Developer Hypixel Studios confirmed it is seeking legal action over an unauthorized Nintendo Switch eShop copycat of what upcoming sandbox RPG?
Henry Cavill debuted the first footage of his upcoming action-fantasy reboot at CinemaCon 2026. Which immortal warrior is he portraying?
